product_reference.notes: Local fixture mirrors a small pilot subset of the sheet. The full sheet remains product reference only for v0.

tickers.research_angle: Core AI compute and chip ecosystem exposure.
tickers.thesis_hook: Core AI compute and chip ecosystem exposure.
tickers.risk_skeptic_lens: Valuation, export controls, capex cyclicality, competitive pressure.
what_changed: Pilot fixture keeps AI accelerator demand and data center growth as the current review focus.
Existing paper holding is close to the sample single-name limit.
why_it_may_matter: AI compute demand can affect revenue durability, margins, and market expectations.
High expectations make valuation and capex cyclicality important skeptic checks.

evidence.evidence_note: Use primary earnings materials and filings for confirmation.
Review latest 10-Q or 10-K before raising paper conviction.

missing_verification: Confirm latest data center revenue growth and margin commentary from primary sources.
Check current valuation context and export-control risk.
manual_review_items: Compare current paper exposure against max single-name rule.
Add bear-case notes before any future paper change.

tickers.research_angle: AI clusters need faster networking, switching, interconnect, and connectivity.
tickers.thesis_hook: AI clusters need faster networking, switching, interconnect, and connectivity.
tickers.risk_skeptic_lens: AI capex durability, hyperscaler concentration, margin pressure.
what_changed: Sheet category highlights networking as a separate AI infrastructure bottleneck.
No current paper holding exists in the sample portfolio.
why_it_may_matter: Networking exposure may diversify the AI infrastructure paper book away from GPU-only exposure.
Customer concentration and AI capex durability still need skeptic review.

evidence.evidence_note: Use company materials to verify AI networking demand claims.
Review latest filing for segment exposure and risk factors.

missing_verification: Confirm AI revenue mix from primary company sources.
Check valuation and customer concentration risk.
manual_review_items: Verify whether AI networking thesis is supported by filings and earnings call language.
Compare against existing semis exposure before any paper action is manually approved.

tickers.research_angle: AI data center growth stresses grid, power equipment, and electrification supply chains.
tickers.thesis_hook: AI data center growth stresses grid, power equipment, and electrification supply chains.
tickers.risk_skeptic_lens: Project timing, regulation, grid bottlenecks, capital intensity.
what_changed: Power and cooling remain a first-watchlist category for AI infrastructure bottlenecks.
Sample portfolio already has a modest paper holding.
why_it_may_matter: Power and cooling constraints may become a second-order AI infrastructure bottleneck.
Project timing and valuation risk can weaken the thesis.

evidence.evidence_note: Use primary materials to verify demand and backlog commentary.

missing_verification: Confirm backlog, margin, and project timing commentary.
Check whether AI data center demand is already reflected in expectations.
manual_review_items: Review latest investor presentation and earnings transcript.
Add downside case for capital intensity and project delays.

tickers.research_angle: AI, autonomy, and software are becoming larger parts of defense modernization.
tickers.thesis_hook: AI, autonomy, and software are becoming larger parts of defense modernization.
tickers.risk_skeptic_lens: Budget cycles, procurement timing, political/regulatory exposure.
what_changed: Sample paper holding is above the max single-name rule.
Defense AI thesis remains active but needs valuation and concentration review.
why_it_may_matter: Overweight mock exposure creates a rule-based concentration issue.
Government and commercial AI adoption evidence needs stronger source support.

evidence.evidence_note: Use primary earnings materials and filings for confirmation.

missing_verification: Confirm current commercial AI platform adoption evidence.
Check valuation context and defense procurement timing.
Review whether sample paper weight violates concentration rules.
manual_review_items: Review concentration breach before approving any paper change.
Add skeptic case on valuation and political risk.

tickers.research_angle: Direct exposure to AI compute capacity, hosting, and data center infrastructure.
tickers.thesis_hook: Direct exposure to AI compute capacity, hosting, and data center infrastructure.
tickers.risk_skeptic_lens: Power availability, financing, crypto/AI overlap, utilization risk.
what_changed: Data center infrastructure is in the first-watchlist universe.
This sample item has high missing-verification burden and crypto-adjacent risk language.
why_it_may_matter: AI hosting could be a real infrastructure theme if backed by contracts and utilization evidence.
Financing, power availability, and crypto-adjacent overlap can make the risk case too weak for the sample paper committee.

evidence.evidence_note: Use company materials to separate AI hosting evidence from crypto-adjacent activity.

missing_verification: Verify AI hosting revenue, contracts, utilization, and power availability.
Separate AI infrastructure exposure from crypto-adjacent activity.
Review financing, dilution, and customer concentration risk.
Find contradictory evidence before any future paper escalation.
manual_review_items: Do not escalate until crypto-adjacent risk and financing risk are manually reviewed.
Require primary-source evidence for AI hosting revenue and utilization.

tickers.research_angle: Core AI compute and chip ecosystem exposure.
tickers.thesis_hook: Core AI compute and chip ecosystem exposure.
tickers.risk_skeptic_lens: Valuation, export controls, capex cyclicality, competitive pressure.
what_changed: AMD remains in the semis pilot universe, but this fixture has less evidence than NVDA or AVGO.
why_it_may_matter: AMD may matter as a second-source AI accelerator name, but evidence quality is not yet high enough for a paper candidate.

evidence.evidence_note: Use primary company materials to verify AI accelerator demand and competitive positioning.

missing_verification: Verify AI accelerator revenue trajectory and margin context.
Compare competitive position against stronger evidence names.
manual_review_items: Keep in watch state until stronger source-backed evidence is added.
